reviews.review_text: Beautiful place to stay, my 12 kids enjoyed the waterslide very much. The office staff and maintenance team are very friendly. Thanks for having us on our stay 😀
Stayed from Friday afternoon till check out Tuesday morning. Loved the place,cabin was perfect, very relaxed atmosphere.Staff were ver helpful. Will definetly be going back.

My 2 little grand daughters and I stayed for the weekend and had a fantastic time.  The waterpark and pool for kids was great.  Close and easy walk to beach and cafe.  My accommodation was at the cheaper end and it showed but was clean and tidy.  Was value for money and would stay again.

Stayed a couple of nights in one of the cabins nearest the beach.
Facilities were good, nice pool and waterpark with slides etc.
Location top notch. Stones throw from Shelly Beach, short stroll to the bowling club (membership discount included as a perk of staying there), shopping centre a few minutes away.
Good, family friendly spot
Very disappointed with the stay first 3 nights were absolutely terrible people having party's till 2 at night random folks coming in and out,and I can go on but overall bad experience

6 out of ten

Pretty good experiences and amazing waterpark but the cabins were not so good my sheets had holes in them and floors were slightly dirty.

Bathroom
GROSS AND MOLDY WITH BROKEN SHOWER DOORS! Also have to add the door was chipped

As a former caravan owner, I wouldn’t recommend staying here. While the waterpark, pool, and camp kitchen are decent and most staff are friendly, the park overall is only average and poorly maintained.

The shower facilities are a major letdown. Both shower blocks have broken shower heads that spray water everywhere, along with very low water pressure and limited hot water. They only work properly when one person is showering at a time; as soon as two or more people use them, the pressure drops and hot water quickly runs out.

The roads are another ongoing issue. There are many potholes, and despite being told multiple times that they would be fixed, nothing has changed.

It also feels like very little money is being spent on maintaining this park. Although management denies it, it seems that funds that should be used to fix issues at Shelly Beach are instead being put into their other holiday park.

The Chew Chew Can is overpriced (though this isn’t the park’s fault as it’s privately owned). On a positive note, the location is convenient, close to shops and within walking distance to the beach, creating excellent opportunities for family fun!

Great park for kids, the villas really need an upgrade, I come here yearly and get the same villa all the time which is villa 5, this time I found my villa was dirtier than normal, where the fabric couch was making me itchy, kitchen cupboards not working properly, the wi fi did not work at all but our friends at villa 6 did and the fridge not having a tray for fruit and veggies. We called and asked for one, they said they will come but no one did. There’s already hardly any reception with the mobile phones at this park and Im with Telstra so the wi fi is really important. I could not connect once and kids need it more especially for their ipads and gaming.
Fantastic location and facilities very family friendly

Disappointing stay. Pool and slides not heated, cabin not clean, and basic items missing (no pot, no scissors etc). Tiny car space was very difficult to access. Loud nightly noise from nearby permanent caravans made it hard for the kids to sleep until quite late. Would not stay again.
We had a great time.
Great

Do not camp here.

The cars going past on the busy street kept us up all night. We requested to move campsites to what we thought would be a quieter part, and whilst we were told we were welcome to, we were also told that it probably won’t be much better as car hoons like to utilise that road at nighttime. There are other reviews outlining car noise as a major issue for campers.

As a business, if you are aware of an issue on one of your services, why would you continue to provide it as an option?

The sites were small, like a sandy, dirty parking spot.

Amenities were well maintained and clean. Good location and proximity to beach. Won’t be back though.
Great location and fabulous swimming pools
Busy

Turned up late,was actually scary driving in.
Parked in parking area and stepped in puddle of water.
The mattress,s were old spring, we all woke up with aches.
Went to front office the next morning and the police were there with an ice head in the office.
Looks like a getto.
Its a shame as its such a beautiful location.
I suggest dont put permanent s with holiday makers.
Staff was lovely.

Absolutely loved our stay at The Shelly Beach Holiday Park! We stayed in one of the newer cabins by the pool/splash park — super clean and perfect for our family of seven.

Parking was limited to one car, but plenty of public parking by the beach gate made it easy. The long weekend activities kept everyone entertained.

Awesome location — cafés within walking distance (Bateau Bay Café was our fave!), Wyrrabalong Coastal Walk and Shelly Beach close by, and 3 Peppers Pizza was a hit for dinner. The kids had a blast — we’ll definitely be back! 😊🌴

Would not recommend at all.|Park full of old rundown caravans.|All camp and rv sites on main road-no sleep at all!|Amenities closed each day between 9 and 11 am - bad choice of hours |1 night and out of there as fast as we could
Lovely place for a stopover. Excellent beach.

Great Spot! |Perfect  location for a coastal getaway with children. |Family of 6 - Great water park for the kids. Short stroll to the cafe right on Shelly beach. Spacious tidy cabins - The kids loved their own retreat up stairs. |Plenty of room for my husband, baby and I down stairs in the main bedroom. |Late checkout made it even better. ||Definitely would recommend. ||The Bewleys xx
Loved the beachside ca ins very clean and comfortable wifi worked cheap laundry facilities loved the pool and slide. Plenty of bbqs around the park to.

We stayed in the loft cabin which was a good size for us, but the walls attached must be quite thin as we heard lots of noise of the stairs and constant bunk bed climbing of the room next door (may have been very loud neighbours). The other holiday house vans are quite packed in. The water park and slides were good and the on-site food van on the weekends was also great.
Beautiful location, plenty of things to see and do, and caters for all ages.

Great location, lovely individual cabins with the comforts of home, fantastic for a family holiday without costing an arm or a leg. Lots of amenities on site for easy access. Water park & pool on site for the kids ( & adults) to have fun & the beach is right across the road. Only a short drive from Bateau Bay & The Entrance if you want to sightsee.

Absolutely loved our stay!! The staff are fantastic to deal with, both while booking & on our arrival, great customer service. We were in one of the beach walk cabins & it was awesome hearing the waves at night. My kids loved walking down to the beach each morning. Very happy with the location, short drives to any tourist attractions we wanted to do. Great in-house facilities too, with the kids braving the cold to test out the water park. It’s pretty close to the local shopping centre & such a nice touch to be able to get members prices for dinner at the Bateau Bay bowling club for a nice night out!! The cabin was a good size for our family, the only concern we had was the placement of the bunks upstairs because our little boy sometimes sleep walks in an unknown environment but it was easily managed.  Definitely recommend to anyone who wants a home away from home experience while on holidays, we’ll definitely be back!!

Stayed only one night for a funeral and it wasn’t a very pleasant experience. The cabins are so dusty and gross. There was a dead cockroach upon entering the cabin and had a horrible musty smell. You would think someone wouldn’t done another clean when expecting someone to stay in there. My allergies were horrible with the amount of dust. My feet were black after taking my shoes off and walking around. The shower doesn’t even turn off properly and keeps running even when I turned the taps off all the way. The main room downstairs is also extremely cold as the heater doesn't reach down the hall. Walls are so thin I can hear people stomping and running all night. Overall not a great experience. I bet one of the newer cabins would’ve been nicer had it been available. The old cabins where the beach is need to be upgraded and cleaned properly.

We stayed in a cabin that was just a short walk to the beach – such a bonus! It was lovely hearing the waves at night, so relaxing. The cabin itself was clean and had everything we needed, including a well-equipped kitchen. Customer service was also great – really helpful and kind.

A couple of things to note: the floorboards were quite squeaky, which made it a bit noisy at night, and the main bedroom was very cold as the heater didn’t seem to reach it. Also, while the cabin was tidy, it could use a deeper clean – the lamps and window sills were quite dusty. The walls are also super thin, there were lots of random loud noises during the night and you can hear everything going on outside. Unfortunately we can't control other people but some consideration goes a long way.

Still, overall it was a great stay and we enjoyed being so close to the beach!
Great caravan park, kids love the water park and slide, pool. Close to Shelly beach ⛱️ very good

This place is disgusting…. Front cabins stink and are filthy…. Lucky we are only staying for one night as we would definitely change accommodation which is unfortunate as it’s not our first time staying here but since our last visit 2 years ago it is very rundown looking and very unappealing upon entering. The only good things about this park is the proximity to beach and the kids waterpark in the fresh air… because it stinks of mould in your cabin…cabins are disgusting and even questioned ourselves driving in due to the appearance….
Awesome place to check out for your holidays
Excellent location, the beach is rocky and beautiful. The park is clean, quiet, everything in order. We are going to come back !!
Great location, staff were very helpful and friendly.  Cabin was very modern and clean. Highly recommend staying here. It's my second time here and definitely won't be my last.

Stayed there for a week in a beachwalk cabin that sleeps 6.  (4 bunks upstairs in a loft)  No air-conditioning upstairs and just a fan.  Bathroom totally inefficient if 6 people stayed....too small and no wardrobes, cupboard, or hanging hooks.   Location was good to access the beach and pool area but low standard accommodation.  Very basic and in some areas poorly maintained.  Convenient to shops and local golf course but for a week holiday I would upgrade if possible.
6 of us stayed there in 2 new cabins for 2 weeks working in the aria cabins were great restaurants awsome all walking distance highly recommend

Great Little holiday park. Clean amenities. Good size camp sites and the cabins look really nice. Great pool and water park for the little ones. Stones throw from the beach. Beautiful gardens. I definitely enjoyed my stay.
Great place we go up every year, the kids love it just needs more comfy beds.
Family time away and can not fault the place, not one thing was to hard, willing to drop everything to accommodate everyone's needs.... will be back .

This is a amazing place to stay.The rooms leave a lot to be desired though the staff are very friendly and welcoming also they try their best to make sure your stay is the best it can be.Also chew chew truck has amazing Aussie tucka
Security and team were amazing very friendly park and highly recommend

- Booking and Check In
Absolutely pleasant experiance room was "ready" to check in on time and on the occasion that I called to make enquiries and such in the lead up to our stay, staff were very helpful and informative

- Cabin
Upon check in the room was filthy. Walls had multiple marks, scrapes and filthy. Stove top was greasy and floors were horrible. Air Conditioner was full of mould. Quilts on bed had no quilt covers and room fans were full of dust, peeling paint and rust. Stairs leading to upstairs loft bedroom were sharp and could only be described as a death trap all inclusive with rusty exposed nails on the side. Bunk beds in loft room were broken and slats on the bed were bolted to a large peice of board that was bigger than the bed leading to sharp slats coming out past the bed frame which my son scraped his legs on multiple occasions getting in and out of the bed.
All other cabins had an outdoor seating table except for ours. Bathroom is extremely narrow however was relatively clean. External room light on balcony did not work and light at bottom of stairs was held together by tape and had sharp exposed metal. Included WiFi - not existent.

- Waterpark and pool
Absolutely phenomenal. No complaints at all. This was the highlight of our stay and aside from the staff the only reason for my two star rating.

- Car park and Park security
Very limited lighting throught the park especially in the car park where our cabins were leading to my son tripping over when coming and going due to uneven ground and nil lighting. Rear pedestrian gate rarely locked which was a safety concern that was raised during our stay however not rectified. Signage around driving through the caravan park was near non existent leading to multiple cars going in the wrong direction when coming and going.

Overall our stay was definitely not worth $399 per night and we will not be returning again.

One of the best caravan parks to stop and rest while crossing the border. The facilities are well-maintained, especially the toilets and showering area. The environment is peaceful, making it an ideal spot for a relaxing break during your journey.

We recently stayed at Shelly Beach Accommodation Park with over 40 family members, booking 10 cabins for 5 days. Admittedly, we had read the reviews beforehand, and while they weren’t overly raving, we decided to book on good faith — and we’re so glad we did!

From the start, everything exceeded our expectations. The rooms were clean and tidy, and the coastal cabins were incredibly convenient for our group. The location, so close to the beach, was absolutely phenomenal and made our stay even more enjoyable.

A special mention goes to the night security guard, who was an absolute pleasure and made us feel safe and welcome every evening.

Not a single family member had a complaint — everyone thoroughly enjoyed themselves. We couldn’t fault a thing and would highly recommend Shelly Beach Accommodation Park for large family gatherings or anyone looking for a relaxing coastal getaway. We’ll definitely be back!

I was initially hesitant to book at Shelly Beach Holiday Park after reading some negative reviews, but we decided to give it a chance for our end of year family holiday. We booked 10 cabins, and to be honest, it turned out to be a great experience!

The customer service was excellent, and even though we were a big group making some noise, it was never an issue, which was a relief compared to other places. The cabins were decent, nothing fancy. The upstairs beds and room was small, and bathrooms were quite narrow, but everything else made up for it.

The location was perfect, the park was clean, and the bins were emptied daily. The splash park and pool were a hit with everyone, and the overall vibe was fantastic. Having access to the beach was amazing and so convienent,  Security was also great, and the price was reasonable.

Overall, I’d stay here again!

This was the worst caravan park I have stayed at
Firstly we arrive and someone else is camping in our designated campsite so we have to be in another camp site

Secondly the amenities were so dirty

Thirdly, The campsites back off a main road so all you hear is traffic throughout the night

I also got up to for for a swim and use the camp kitchen at 6.45 am and they were closed! I assume they open late
Amazing place friendly staff and love the upgrades

Great place for a large group of families for a weekend away! Kids can have fun at the pool and slides or riding their bikes around. We have been twice now and will definitely book again! Super friendly staff and well maintained facilities. Cabin has everything you need.

Front room service virtually non existent.  Slowest food I have ever experienced at cafe. Noisiest place I have ever stayed in at cabins. Not cheap for below average accomodation. Shelley beach is great but this place is rated poor in my view

I'm only giving this place 2 stars because its a great place for kids.
We have a camp spot currently and the area is terrible. Cars continuously going past, keeping my husband and myself awake, my kids are barely asleep because of it. A dog was continuously barking across the street. I want nothing less then my money back for the awful experience. To me personally it wasn't worth the money. At 1:36am we are packing our car up and leaving. We will never return again.

Nice three bedroom cabin
Great location
Awesome 👌 👏 👍
Great wifi
Check out the almost $300 a night bunk beds 😂
Great location for school holidays.  Cabin range in sizes.  Pool and water park are in good condition and great for kids. WiFi can be dodgy.

Upon arrival the office attendant was friendly and welcoming. The cabin was spacious, well equipped and very homely. The holiday park itself was amazing. Such a well set out holiday park with clean surroundings and situated in a great location. A very short walk to Shelly Beach and short drives to surrounding suburbs. Supermarkets, shopping malls and any other amenity required are only a short distance away. A beautiful, well managed, friendly and homely holiday park. I highly recommend Shelly Beach Holiday Park to everyone 👍👍

Amazing service from staff couldn’t have been a better weekend away.. we have been here before kids had a ball we stayed in the new cabins and AMAZING. Thankyou again and thankyou too the staff for being so lovely and making our holiday be amazing
I thought the price was quite steep for the quality of the accommodation. The cabin we stayed in was knocked around and not very clean.

If I could give less than 1 star I would.
My husband and I booked a cabin, upon checking in we immediately noticed the cabin was filthy. We called staff and were moved to a beach walk cabin.. walked inside and same thing - very filthy. We have 3 kids and no way would we have stayed there - did not even feel safe even putting them on the couch while calling to ask for a refund! We had travelled 4 hours to stay there and were deeply disappointed by the state of the rooms. The whole park itself looks run down. When we spoke to office staff she was rude and her response was “what do you expect for 3 star accomodation” we insisted she come down and look at the rooms while we were there as she stated that she had just done a audit on the cabins and we would happily show her the mould, grime, dust, stains on bedding etc but she did not and agreed to a full refund as we requested and we booked elsewhere that same day.
Wish we had seen these reviews first before booking!  I did not think to take more photos at the time, the floors in particular the stairs to the loft were disgusting, mould in the bathroom, stained bedding/linen, walls and windows all appeared dirty and an insane amount of dust built up over the fan.
Would not reccomend to anyone.
Awsum

Nice location and service with a great water park. Although, disappointed with the cabin given the price of $330 a night. It was in poor condition with lots of dust, marked walls, torn couch, malfunctioning water system, and old mattresses.

Very disappointed that the park doesn't take full size caravans!

Only has facilities to take small pop tops or camper trailers
Kiwi Kids were out of control at water Park, bullying other kids and guests. Absolute disgrace that the parents were not spoken to about the incident..!
Was amazing, only we should have stayed longer
Busy with holiday makers

We returned to this park for our 8th Christmas family get together. Parts of our family live close by and we congregate here for Christmas Day. The park has great facilities. However, this year turned out to be very disappointing experience. We booked a specific cabin 9 months in advance, went back 2 days before our visit, to take photos for others travelling to organise gazebo's and tables. At this point there was no one in our cabin. We checked in 2 days later and was told there was a maintenance issue with our cabin and they would have to move us, like it or lump it.  Although disappointed we took it on the chin. We went to our cabin, walked around the corner and saw that our original cabin had people in it. Confused, we went back to reception for an explanation, the receptionist could not explain why people were in our original cabin and offered a 25% refund for the inconvenience. This was later overruled by the manager. We asked to speak to the owner, they were not authorised to give out his phone number and that he would call us. We received a text to send an email, not from the owner's number. |We have sent multiple emails with no communication. There were no managers available on the 24,25,26 and 27th of December. |The cabin itself was dated, marks covered the walls, the bathroom was tiny and the bed was hard as a rock. |We had to re-wash all of the kitchenware as it was dirty and greasy.|We left a day early, as we couldn't sleep on a bed of rock for another night.|Unfortunately, this place has gone downhill, my advice is give it a miss. There are plenty of other options in the area.|P.S. We paid $1400 ($350 per night) for this experience.

We came here for our 8th Christmas holiday. Booked a specific cabin 9 months in advance. Family live close by and went to take photos for organising gazebo's and tables for our Christmas breakfast and lunch. The cabin was empty. Checked in 2 days later to be told that the cabin was not available due to a maintenance issue. We were told we had to be moved, like it or lump it. We accept this and go to our cabin. We see our original cabin on the way to our new cabin and there are people there!!! We go back to reception for an explanation, which they did not have one and were offered a 25% discount. This was overruled by the manager. I asked to speak with the owner and was told that they can't give out his phone number, he would call us. We then received a text (not from owners phone number) to send an email. Have sent numerous emails with no reply.
The cabin itself is dated, marks all over the walls, the bathroom was tiny and the bed was rock hard.
We left a day early as we couldn't sleep on a bed of rock for one more night.
We also paid $1400 ($350 per night) for this experience.
Do yourself a favour and give this place a miss, plenty of other options available in the area.
Family friendly holiday park right on Shelley Beach.

The Shelly Beach holiday park is nothing like what you can see on the pictures. Some parts of the campsite have been renovated however 80% of the park is covered with very old and in poor looking condition permanent caravans that are owned by people who I believe must pay a yearly rent. It looks really bad, no space,  everyone is on the top of one another. We had a tent and were put in the far corner near the road (only spot available for tents).
Not a great experience.

On the top of that, the weekend we stayed, we had a big storm and one of the caravan's added tin roof flew away damaging 3 other caravans and my tent which was destroyed. I doubt the tin roof like so many on this campsite would pass the safety regulation, it looks very dodgy to me. The campsite refused to give me their insurance details as the storm was "an act of god" as they said. Bottom line, my tent was damaged and I had to replaced it.
Beautiful little beach

We stayed here for one night and had a blast of a time. We enjoyed our stay very much. |We stayed in a beach front cabin right across the road from Shelly beach, watching sunrise and sunset was the ultimate. |The park included a waterpark which both us adults and the children absolutaly loved and enjoyed very much, the waterpark was the main highlight of our stay here at the park. |We would gladly book again just for the waterpark. |Cabin was nice and neat with bunks for the kids and a queen bed in the room. Ceiling fans aircon fridge with all necessary things to cook and enjoy yourself. |Just bring extra towels and your set. |Cheap fun short stay for us. Thanks.

My family and I got accused of stealing because the colour of our skin. Did not receive an apology after the staff found out it wasn't us. Very rude towards my family.
Would not recommend to indigenous aust

Excellent park
We camped with our young kids
Excellent pool with large shallow area, and a large pool in general
Awesome water slides that are safe and super fun for kids and adults
Splash areas for little ones too
Roughly 5 minute walk to the beach, easy to take your beach cart down.
Toilets and showers were always reallly clean and smelled lovely
Communal Kitchen is spacious and has multiple sinks so you’re not stuck waiting to wash up for too long
Also BEST CHIPS EVER at the little food van there!!
Awesome park, dare I say my fav one that I’ve been to
CBins getting old

The best location,  close to shelly beach and perfect if you are a golfer as 18 hole golf course right next door. 15mins walk to the Bateau Bay shopping centre with various shops including coles, Aldi, woollworths, restaurants and cafes.  Bateau Bay tennis centre walking distance if you love to hire a court for some tennis.
Cabins are a bit aged with work required to some of them inside and out on the decks but other than that, a lovely place to camp, caravan or rent a cabin
Disgusting holiday park... DONT come here... you've been warned!!

Great place for going to the beach, also close restaurants and grocery shops for a midnight snack. But there are a lot of smokers that my kids with asthma can't really breathe around. Other than that 7/10

Very tired run down holiday park. We booked one of the nicer cabins and unfortunately it was a bit of a disappointment. The kitchen facilities are lacking and maybe do a clean of all plates and cutlery before using as they were very unclean. If you’re looking for a fun nice family getaway then this is not the place. If you’re happy with the bare minimum and don’t mind staying in 2 star at best accommodation then this will be fine for you. Staff are friendly and place is in a good location.

Nice and cosy place. Water park is a fun for kids..
Ocean view cabins are the best to see the beautiful sea and sunrise while sleeping on your bed.
Do not stay at this park unless you want your belongings pinched , and not a place to take children as they don’t like kids being noisy I would never go back to this park

Don’t read into the reviews. I’m glad I didn’t. Sure it’s not perfect to some because of cabins being outdated and noisy, but it was comfortable for us. Has a fun water park for the kids, clean pool that lights up at dark. Can hear the ocean from our cabin and a 2 second walk, and this place has a on site food van that serves breakfast and lunch. Brett was very welcoming at check in. Thank you. Very appreciated. Kids don’t want to go home.
